description: From the manufacturer Helix Duo Twho Hole Pencil Sharpener & Eraser Discover the perfect blend of functionality and style with the Helix Sharpener and Eraser, available in vibrant assorted colours. This versatile tool is ideal for students, artists, and professionals who value precision and convenience in their stationery. Ergonomic Design The ergonomic shape of the Helix Sharpener and Eraser fits comfortably in your hand, making it easy to use for extended periods without discomfort. The compact size is perfect for carrying in pencil cases or bags. Ergonomic Design: Comfortable to hold and easy to use, with a transparent canister to collect shavings and keep your workspace tidy Helix Sharpener and Eraser - Assorted Colours High-Quality Sharpener - Dual Functionality The Helix Sharpener and Eraser combines two essential tools into one compact design. The two hole sharpener ensures your pencils are always sharp for detailed work, while the eraser allows for clean corrections. Featuring a durable metal blade, the sharpener provides smooth and efficient sharpening for both standard and jumbo pencils. The transparent canister collects shavings, keeping your workspace tidy. The eraser is made from PVC-free material Its defined edges allow for precise erasing. Dual Functionality: Combines a high-quality sharpener and a PVC-free eraser in one compact tool, perfect for precise corrections and efficient sharpening Assorted Colours: Available in a choice of colours like blue, green, and grey, adding a touch of personality to your stationery collection. Helix has been a trusted name in stationery for over 130 years, known for its commitment to quality and innovation. The Helix Sharpener and Eraser embodies this tradition, offering a high-quality, versatile tool that meets the needs of modern users.
